sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6704" key="a)naki/dnamai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακίδνᾰμαι</orth>, <sense id="n6704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spread upwards,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἄραψ ἀτμὸς ἐς Ὄλυμπον ἀνακίδναται</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Pae.Delph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
